## Current machine-facing public sleeve JSON set
The public machine-facing JSON sleeve set remains much smaller and more disciplined than the HUMAN lane:
- `slv-operator`
- `sample-basic-minimal`
- `neomagnetar-dynamic-persona-v1`

This is intentional.
The HUMAN lane may grow faster than the machine-facing sleeve lane.
